title: Watch Ramdas Athawale’s poetic farewell to Ghulam Nabi Azad in Rajya Sabha
tags: Ramdas Athawale|Ghulam Nabi Azad|Congress|BJP|RPI|Rajya Sabha|Ghulam Nabi Azad farewell
description: Rajya Sabha MP Ramdas Athawale gave a poetic farewell to Congress leader Ghulam Nabi Azad who retires from the upper house on 15th February 2021. Delivering a speech in his inimitable style, Athawale lauded Azad’s services and also made an offer to the senior Congress leader. Athawale said that if the Congress does not give Azad a Rajya Sabha ticket, the RPI would gladly do so. title: New year 2021 muggulu by easy rangoli Suneetha || Amazing New year Kolam rangoli designs
tags: rangoli|rangoli designs|kolam|kolam designs|muggulu|muggulu designs|rangoli with dots|rangoli designs with dots|easy rangoli|easy rangoli designs|rangoli art|rangoli kolam|kolam rangoli|kolam with dots|simple kolam|sikku kolam|padi kolam|easy kolam|muggulu with dots|designs|latest rangoli|indian art|indian rangoli|रंगोली|kolangal|रंगोली बनाना|रंगोली कैसे बनाते हैं|रंगोली डिजाइन|Diwali|Diwali 2020|Deepavali|simple rangoli|दिवाली|दिवाली रंगोली
description: New year 2021 muggulu by easy rangoli Suneetha || Amazing New year Kolam rangoli designs.It is our tradition to draw kolam every day morning at the doorsteps.There are many benefits of drawing kolam in front of the house.It is auspicious and believes Goddess Lakshmi enters the house if kolam is drawn.Kolam brings a lot of positive vibrations and energy to you and your home.Draw kolam soon after you wake up and then do your prayers.Kolam or rangoli ( रंगोली  ) is a part of Indian culture and transferred from generation to the next generation.This ancient art form is also called as muggulu in parts of South India like Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.People draw different creative rangoli kolam designs using kolam powder or muggu pindi which is actually crushed Lime stone powder available in different parts of India.There are different types of rangoli or kolam designs like dots kolam, sikku kolam, padi kolam, Margazhi kolam.People draw special rangoli designs for Festivals like Sankranthi (Pongal), Diwali (Deepavali), Vijaya Dashami (Dasara).Women create deepam rangoli or kolam designs during Diwali festival time, create very big and Dhanurmasam muggulu (Margazhi) for Sankranthi or Pongal festival.It is a belief among the people that drawing muggulu in front of the house in the early morning soon after wake bringsgood fortune to them and their family.People mix rice flour to limestone powder and prepare their own kolam powder. Muggulu can also be drawn with rice flour only.These Beautiful and creative designs are decorated with flowers based on the occasion or festival.#Newyear2021 #Newyear #Newyearkolam #Newyearmuggulu #Newyearrangoli

This story revolves around daily happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta', is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalal' to call his father 'Champaklal' from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. description: Subscribe to Sony Pal: http:/a/www.youtube.com/sonypalindiaTaarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G1DSZ-26hoFNNWQ9Jnu9kZuEpisode 2555: Goli Steals Bhide's Food------------------------------------The Gokuldham society is all set for welcoming Ganpati Bappa with preparations done. The previous night it was raining heavily and the society members had hoped that the rain will light up the next day so that they can bring Ganpati Bappa with full celebrations. But when they wake up the next day, they find the situation has gone worse and due to heavy rains, the roads are blocked. How will they bring Ganpati Ji now?Show Name – Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah ChashmahStar Cast –  Dilip Joshi, Disha Vakani, Amit Bhatt, Raj AnankatEpisodes No - 2555Produced By -  Asit Kumarr Modi#TaarakMehtaKaOoltahChashmah#तारकमेहताकाउल्टाचश्मा #SonyPAL About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:--------------------------------------------------------------------The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.Will Ganesh Chaturthi Get Cancelled? | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | FE 2555 | 1 Sep 2022

description: Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindiaEpisode 826: Taarak Goes To Dr Haathi-------------------------------------------------------------------------Taarak has a bad toothache after eating the beetle leaves offered by Jethalal. He runs to Dr. Haathi to find out that he has the same problem. Jethalal sticks tape on Daya's mouth to prevent her from talking.About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:--------------------------------------------------------------------The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

description: Click here to subscribe to SAB: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1Episode 3843: Tamatar Ki Chori--------------------------------------------------------At the Gokuldham Society, the tomatoes are delivered, and Bhide and Madhvi proceed to inspect them. Madhvi's delivery of the tomatoes to Bhide means that she can now easily fulfill the pickle order, which makes Bhide happy. The hefty tomato basket is too much for Madhvi and Bhide to lift and carry inside. Bhide makes the decision to retire for the night, keeping watch over them until dawn. The newspaper is surprised to see Bhide sleeping on the floor the following morning. Bhide is hesitant to explain why. When Bhide arrives home in the morning, he instructs Madhvi to keep an eye on the tomatoes from the balcony. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. Andhra Teacher Loses Rs. 21 Lakh - By Kishor Singh #shortsRight before the fraudulent deduction of 2.1 million rupees, she received a WhatsApp message from an unknown number that included a link. She instantly opened that link of curiosity and got trapped under the scam?Let's understand how actually these kinds of WhatsApp frauds take place in the first place. What if you start getting flash messages regarding the deduction of balance from your bank account and ultimately get your account balance low by 2.1 million rupees? Something exactly similar happened with a retired teacher of Andhra Pradesh, let's see what mistake of her lead her to this loss.Actually, this link was sent to her by a scammer through WhatsApp. As soon as she clicked the link, the scammer got full access to her phone.Most people keep photographs of their credit and debit card on their phones. And it becomes really easy to zero your bank balance with the help of these cards. But some people avoid keeping their bank details on their phones and still get scammed. The effects of strenuous work are showing and Jethalal feels tired. Meanwhile, Popatlal thanks the ladies for making them clean their respective houses. Show Name – Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah ChashmahStar Cast –  Dilip Joshi, Disha Vakani, Amit Bhatt, Raj AnankatEpisodes No - 1522Produced By -  Asit Kumarr Modi#TaarakMehtaKaOoltahChashmah #तारकमेहताकाउल्टाचश्मा  #sonypal About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:----------------------------------------------------------------------The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi), an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Raj Anankat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or be prepared to leave the premises.Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G1DSZ-26hoFNNWQ9Jnu9kZuक्यों है Gokuldham की पुरुष मंडली परेशान? | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | FE 1522 | 6 June 2023

description: Amazing camping tricks and ideas that will change your lifeDo you have any last-minute plans this summer? Since most of us just spend our holidays at home, it might be a good idea to go out and explore nature. Maybe a camping adventure will be the perfect get-away. If you haven’t decided where you’re going next, I’m sharing with you some cool and amazing camping hacks you can try in nature that will save you money this summer. For starters, I show you some cool tricks with cling film/plastic wrap in the wild. One of them is to use it to warm up your body when you’re cold. If it’s too windy and you can’t start a fire, wrap your matches in some insulation tape and then light them. Watch the video to see some tasty meals you can try in the wild and other important emergency hacks. Timestamps:1:03 – A DIY waterproof case for your phone2:26 – Cool hacks for your matches in windy weather3:36 – DIY whistle from a soda can5:57 – Emergency natural deodorant7:47 – Tasty outdoors cooking10:31 – Easy cooking trick inside a soda can13:27 – DIY emergency compass  This video is made for entertainment purposes. This story evolves around happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

description: Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindiaEpisode 726: The Youfull Occasion Of Diwali-----------------------------------------Bhide and Madhvi are discussing to take new lighting and kandil on the occasion of Diwali and even ask Sonu what she wants in Diwali. Sodhi asks Gogi what he wants for this Diwali. Tapusena gets together and decides to ask for cash from their parents without revealing the reason. But Tapusena return empty-handed as none of the parents gives them cash. Watch the full episode.About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:-------------------------------------------The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:--------------------------------------------------------------------The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in Gokuldham Co-operative Society and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.Cast:---------Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal GadaDisha Vakani as
